findings.title: KPI.md has no Q3 2026 OKR section — Q3 starts in 7 days
findings.description: KPI.md last_updated is 2026-06-10 (14 days stale). All Q2 OKRs are MISSED and Q2 ends 2026-06-30. Q3 2026 starts 2026-07-01 (7 days away) with zero OKRs defined. Without Q3 goals, workers have no quarter objective to align to and the review cadence (AGENTS.md §12) cannot function.
findings.fix: Update last_updated, add Q3 2026 OKR placeholder section with ACTION REQUIRED note calling for Sebastian/Esme to populate before 2026-07-01.

findings.title: .omc/STATUS.md day counts and last_updated are stale
findings.description: STATUS.md last_updated is 2026-06-20 (4 days stale, today is 2026-06-24). The In-flight block says 'day 30 overdue' for SPRINT-2026-05-B; actual count is now 34 days. Up-next item 1 says '30 days overdue'; item 2 says '31 days overdue'. Day counts must be updated so the next agent reading this gets accurate urgency signals.
findings.fix: Update last_updated, day counts in In-flight + Up-next sections, and add 2026-06-24 Done entry for this audit run.
